title: AutoShifter
description: Mod that automatically holds shift while mining any ore block. (Intended for use with Veinminer)
body:
## AutoShifter - Automatically crouch while mining ore!
This mod is intended to be used with Veinminer to quickly mine ore without having to crouch every time. 
_It will work without Veinminer_, and will work in Multiplayer as well.

By default, the mod will run automatically. You can toggle the mod using **/autoshifter off** & **/autoshifter on**

The mod supports all ores, including Deepslate Ores, Quartz, and Ancient Debris.
